title: Blackstone Pays $2.3 Billion for Pet Care Brand Rover
text: Pet care marketplace Rover is set to be acquired by private equity firm Blackstone for $2.3 billion. “We are thrilled for this next chapter in the Rover story and look forward to the partnership with the Blackstone team, who share our conviction, excitement and strategic vision,” Aaron Easterly, co-founder and CEO of Rover, said in a news release Wednesday (Nov. 29).

title: Private Credit Power Plays: 3 Stocks You Can't Afford to Miss
text: Bloomberg recently discussed how a handful of investment firms control the $1.6 trillion private credit market, including Ares Management (NYSE: ARES ) and Blackstone (NYSE: BX ).  “Private lenders have swooped into a void left by banks shying away from riskier loans amid fears of an economic slowdown.

title: Blackstone paying $2.3 billion to acquire Rover
text: Blackstone will shell out $11 per share to acquire Rover and turn the pet care services platform back into a private company, according to a Wednesday press release.

title: Blackstone is buying Rover Group at a big premium
text: Rover Group Inc (NASDAQ: ROVR) jumped nearly 30% on Wednesday after Blackstone Inc (NYSE: BX) said it will buy the online marketplace for pet care services for about $2.30 billion. Rover has a thirty-day go-shop period The all-cash transaction values each share of Rover Group at $11.

title: Rover's stock rockets after $2.3 billion cash buyout deal with Blackstone
text: Shares of Rover Group Inc. ROVR rocketed 27.1% in premarket trading, putting them on track for a record one-day gain, after the online pet-care marketplace announced an agreement to be acquired by Blackstone Inc. BX in a cash deal valued at $2.3 billion. Under terms of the agreement, Rover shareholders will receive $11 in cash for each Rover share outstanding, which represents a 29.4% premium to Tuesday's closing price of $8.50.

title: Apollo Global stock: Here's why it is better than Blackstone
text: Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) stock price has done well in 2023 even as the private equity industry faces numerous headwinds. The shares jumped to a high of $91.42 on Friday as they near their all-time high of $92.76.

title: Blackstone-backed Prima seeks bids for minority stake in $1.1 bln deal–sources
text: Prima Assicurazioni, an insurance start-up backed by some of the world's largest private equity firms, is seeking indicative offers this week to bring in a new minority investor and raise fresh cash, two people close to the matter told Reuters.

title: 4 Dividend Stocks I'm Most Thankful I Owned This Year
text: The S&P 500 has rallied sharply in 2023. Several of my dividend stocks have outperformed the market this year.

title: Blackstone (BX) Decides to Wind Down Its Multi-Strategy Fund
text: Blackstone (BX) to close its Diversified Multi-Strategy fund by the end of this year because of dull returns.

title: Blackstone confirms deal to buy Civica
text: Blackstone Inc. BX on Wednesday confirmed reports it's agreed to buy software company Civica from Partners Group Holding AG. The deal had been reported Tuesday by The Wall Street Journal for a price of $2.5 billion.

title: EBay agrees to sell stake in Adevinta in Blackstone, Permira buyout deal
text: Adevinta's stock NO:ADE ADEVY was in the spotlight on Wednesday after Permira and Blackstone Inc. BX on Tuesday said they are offering to buy all of the outstanding ordinary Class A shares in the Norway-based online classified advertising company for $13 billion. Adevinta stock was up 5% in Norway on Wednesday, while its American depositary shares have not yet traded.

title: Blackstone close to buying software company Civica for $2.5 billion: WSJ
text: Blackstone Inc. BX is closing in on an acquisition of software developer Civica for $2.5 billion, The Wall Street Journal reported Tuesday. The seller on the deal is Partners Group Holding AG, another private-equity firm that paid about $1.3 billion for Civica in 2017.

title: Blackstone Nears $2.5 Billion Deal to Buy Software Developer Civica
text: The possible deal is one of at least two multibillion-dollar acquisitions the buyout giant could strike in Europe over the coming days.

title: Blackstone (BX) Leads in Property Loan Sale of Signature Bank
text: Blackstone (BX) is the frontrunner to win the $17-billion portfolio of commercial property loans from the FDIC's sale of Signature Bank debt.

title: Blackstone to Present at the Goldman Sachs 2023 US Financial Services Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Blackstone (NYSE:BX) announced today that Jon Gray, President and Chief Operating Officer, is scheduled to present at the Goldman Sachs 2023 US Financial Services Conference on Wednesday, December 6, 2023 at 12:20pm ET. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the Shareholders section of Blackstone's website at http://ir.blackstone.com. For those unable to listen to the live webcast, a replay will be available on Blackstone's website shortly after the e.

title: Blackstone Top Bidder for Signature's Commercial Property Loans
text: Private equity group Blackstone is reportedly the leading bidder for Signature Bank's commercial property loans. Sources tell Bloomberg News that Blackstone is the frontrunner to gain possession of an approximately $17 billion loan portfolio from the failed bank, per a report Sunday (Nov. 19).

title: Blackstone frontrunner in Signature Bank commercial-property loan sale- Bloomberg News
text: Blackstone is the lead to win the $17 billion portfolio of commercial-property loans from the U.S. Federal Deposit Insurance Corp's sale of Signature Bank debt, Bloomberg News reported on Sunday.

title: Blackstone Vs. Apollo: The Winner Might Shock You
text: Asset management is a cash-minting machine of an industry with infinite growth capabilities. But, there's a catch. BlackRock and Vanguard have destroyed the traditional mutual fund industry, and now there is only one place left with fat fees. Alternative asset management is a $20 trillion industry, growing at 35% and charging about 5X higher fees than BlackRock or Vanguard.

title: Blackstone, Macquarie deny ASPI sale report, pledge commitment
text: Blackstone and Macquarie on Friday dismissed as "completely false" an Italian newspaper report about possible ownership changes at Autostrade per l'Italia (ASPI), pledging their commitment as investors in the motorway operator.

title: RPRX or BX: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?

title: Redpin Launches Following £140m Backing From Blackstone to Revolutionise Payments and Embedded Software Across the International Property Market
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Redpin launches following £140m backing from Blackstone to revolutionise payments and embedded software across the international property market.

title: U.S. recession signs are resurgent and Blackstone's Jon Gray says investors should heed them
text: Jon Gray, the president of Blackstone Group, the world's biggest alternative asset investment firm with $1 trillion under management, is bracing for a recession in the coming months, he told MarketWatch in an interview in late October.

title: Global buyout firm CVC postpones IPO plans
text: CVC Capital Partners has postponed its plans to list in Amsterdam, another blow to the jittery initial public offering market. The global buyout firm, which competes with Apollo Global Management Inc. APO, Blackstone Inc. BX, and other private-equity giants, had planned to go public as early as this week.

title: Blackstone stock price enters bear market as private equity woes mount
text: Blackstone (NYSE: BX) stock price has come under intense pressure as the private equity sector faces the biggest headwind in years. After peaking at $115.78 in September, the stock has dived by more than 20% to the current $92.
